title: Opening for Production Engineer at Finolex Industries

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Finolex Industries
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!
